body.title: Reroute export_chat.py and StaleChatLogBackfiller to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
T-chat-history-igor-backfill shipped export_chat.py writing to ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/. The agent_datacenter migration (T-adc-chat-history-migrate) moved the canonical CC log location to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/. The backfiller and export_chat.py still write to the old path, so the periodic job isn't populating the new location.

Fix: update export_chat.py default output dir to AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME/logs/CC.0/ (falling back to ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/ if env not set). Update the StaleChatLogBackfiller push source registration to use the new path. Old files in claude_chat_logs/ can stay — no migration needed, just new writes go to the right place.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/export_chat.py (output dir), wild_igor/igor/ (wherever StaleChatLogBackfiller is registered — likely a habits or push_sources file)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code. No new schemas.
**Scope boundary:** IN: output path update + backfiller registration update. OUT: migrating historical claude_chat_logs/ files.
**Test plan:** Run export_chat.py --dry-run, verify output path is ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Check StaleChatLogBackfiller registration references correct dir.
